entities.name: Tubal

attributes.role: demon inscribed on image to afflict target

entities.raw_quote: …the name of her whom you wish, and draw the image of a naked woman as best you can, saying, ‘I draw so-and-so, N., daughter of so-and-so, whom I wish to have, in the name of these six hot spirits, namely Tubal, Satan, Reuces, Cupido, Afalion, Duliatus…’

entities.name: Satan

attributes.role: demon inscribed on image to afflict target

entities.raw_quote: Then write on her right arm ‘Satan’, and on her left arm ‘Reuces’…

entities.name: Reuces

attributes.role: demon inscribed on image to afflict target

entities.raw_quote: Then write on her right arm ‘Satan’, and on her left arm ‘Reuces’…

entities.name: Cupido

attributes.role: demon inscribed on image to arouse sexual desire

entities.raw_quote: When you have done this, write on the genitals of the image the name ‘Cupid’, saying, ‘As you, Cupid, are on the genitals of this image…’

entities.name: Afalion

attributes.role: demon inscribed on image to afflict legs

entities.raw_quote: When you have said this, write on the right leg ‘Afalion’, and on the left leg ‘Duliatus’…

entities.name: Duliatus

attributes.role: demon inscribed on image to afflict legs

entities.raw_quote: When you have said this, write on the right leg ‘Afalion’, and on the left leg ‘Duliatus’…

entities.name: Sobedon

attributes.role: lord to whom demons are bound in obedience

entities.raw_quote: I conjure all you demons inscribed on this image, by your lords to whom you are bound in obedience — Sobedon, Badalam and Berith — that you should inflame so-and-so…

entities.name: Badalam

attributes.role: lord to whom demons are bound in obedience

entities.raw_quote: I conjure all you demons inscribed on this image, by your lords to whom you are bound in obedience — Sobedon, Badalam and Berith — that you should inflame so-and-so…

entities.name: Zagam

attributes.role: demon invoked in Liber de angelis love ritual

entities.raw_quote: ...invoking a spirit of dubious character named Zagam (‘O Zagam, accept this dove which I sacrifice to you!’).

entities.name: Astaroth

attributes.role: prince of the south invoked in conjuration

entities.raw_quote: ...especially those four spirits who hold dominion and power over those spirits in the four parts of the globe, to wit, Astaroth, Aroch, Godras, [and] Vynicon.

entities.name: CLM 849
entities.raw_quote: Our necromantic manual in Clm 849 includes four experiments said to induce love...

entities.name: Liber de angelis

attributes.title: Book of Angels
attributes.context: source text for comparative erotic magic

entities.raw_quote: An experiment for love in the Liber de angelis requires going to a crossroads or a gallows...

entities.name: amor hereos
entities.raw_quote: ...a Netherlandish compilation gives detailed instructions for ‘the best and surest experiment in the world to secure friendship or love between a man and a woman’, and says that in Latin such love is called ‘amor hereos’, and is burning and insindissoluble.

entities.name: white dove

attributes.role: sacrificial animal for love magic

entities.raw_quote: first you must have a totally white dove and a parchment made from a female dog that is in heat...

entities.name: female dog in heat

attributes.role: source of parchment for love magic

entities.raw_quote: ...a parchment made from a female dog that is in heat, from whom it is most easily to be had...

entities.name: eagle quill

attributes.role: writing implement for inscribing demon names

entities.raw_quote: You should also have a quill from an eagle.

entities.name: myrrh

attributes.role: fumigant in love magic ritual

entities.raw_quote: When you have said this, take myrrh and saffron, kindle a fire, and fumigate the image...

entities.name: saffron

attributes.role: fumigant in love magic ritual

entities.raw_quote: When you have said this, take myrrh and saffron, kindle a fire, and fumigate the image...

entities.name: horsehair

attributes.role: suspension cord for image

entities.raw_quote: When you have said this conjuration three times... take a hair from the tail of a horse and suspend the parchment with this hair...

entities.name: iron stylus

attributes.role: used to trace circle

entities.raw_quote: Take an iron stylus and trace [a band with names in it] round the circle...

entities.name: sword

attributes.role: used to draw protective circle

entities.raw_quote: Take a sword and make with it a circle on the ground.

summary: This chunk details a complex love magic ritual from the Munich Handbook (CLM 849), involving inscribing demon names on an image of the target woman made from parchment of a female dog in heat, using dove blood and eagle quill. It includes fumigation with myrrh and saffron, suspension of the image, and a final summoning circle containing eleven spirit names (e.g., Rator, Lampoy) to compel the woman’s presence via six angelic-appearing spirits. The ritual is framed as non-dangerous and highly effective, even attributed to Solomon.
key_passages: ‘I draw so-and-so, N., daughter of so-and-so, whom I wish to have, in the name of these six hot spirits, namely Tubal, Satan, Reuces, Cupido, Afalion, Duliatus, that she may love me above all others living in this world.’
‘As you, Satan, and you, Reuces, are inscribed on this image made in the name of so-and-so, may you so afflict her arms without delay, so that she can do nothing but desire to embrace me.’
I conjure all you demons inscribed on this image, by your lords to whom you are bound in obedience — Sobedon, Badalam and Berith — that you should inflame so-and-so…

The circle is shown as a single band containing the names Rator, Lampoy, Despan, Brunlo, Dronoth, Maloqui, Satola, Gelbid, Mascifm, Nartim and Lodoni. The centre of the circle is labelled ‘Place of the Master’.

When she enters the circle and you greet her, remember to touch her with the image that you have around your neck, and on this account she will love you for all eternity and will not care to see anyone but you.
